song.title: Dear Savior Thou Art Mine
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Dear Savior, Thou art mine, How sweet the thought to me; Let me repeat Thy name, And lift my heart to Thee.
[C] Chorus Mine! Mine! Mine! I know Thou art mine; Savior, dear Savior, I know Thou art mine.
[V2] 2) Thou art the sinner’s friend, So I Thy friendship claim, A sinner saved by grace, When Thy sweet message came.
[V3] 3) My hardened heart was touched; Thy pard’ning voice I heard; And joy and peace came in While list’ning to Thy word.
[V4] 4) So let me sing Thy praise, So let me call Thee mine. I cannot doubt Thy word, I know that I am Thine.
song.author: Anna Hudson
